dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Advanced Colorectal Cancer Either of the following two regimens is recommended: 1. Leucovorin is administered at 200 mg/m 2 by slow intravenous injection over a minimum of 3 minutes, followed by 5-fluorouracil at 370 mg/m 2 by intravenous injection. 2. Leucovorin is administered at 20 mg/m 2 by intravenous injection followed by 5-fluorouracil at 425 mg/m 2 by intravenous injection. 5-Fluorouracil and leucovorin should be administered separately to avoid the formation of
